programme.title: Garv: Pride and Honour
programme.desc: About to retire, police inspector Samar Singh changes his mind when he discovers that a recently elected official has ties with the underworld.

programme.title: Dashing Jigarwala 3
programme.desc: A newly appointed college Vice Principal makes a film about the eventful life of the college's founder in order to raise funds for a new accommodation block.

programme.title: Dil Dosti Etc
programme.desc: Delhi-based students Sanjay Mishra, and Apurv, challenge each other to win the University elections and sleep with three different girls respectively before the election results are revealed.

programme.title: Pyaar Tune Kya Kiya
programme.desc: As an only child, Ria Jaiswal got everything she wanted. However, as a woman, she falls in love with an already married photographer and sets out to get what she wants, no matter what the consequences may be.

programme.title: Tera Jadoo Chal Gaya
programme.desc: While a popular artist Kabir falls for Pooja during their brief encounter in Agra, she falls in love with her boss's son Raj. She pretends to be engaged to Kabir to avoid getting fired. Unaware of her motive, Kabir is happy about it.

programme.title: Shaadi No. 1
programme.desc: Kothari has three daughters who shun the idea of arranged marriages. To make them realize, he wants three men to woo the ladies, and then ditch them.

programme.title: I Love NY
programme.desc: A beautiful musician and a serious Wall Street banker cross paths and fall in love with each other over one magical New Year's Eve.

programme.title: Housefull 2
programme.desc: Four fathers who are all sworn enemies, try to marry their daughter the son of a tycoon called Jolly. But when the real Jolly appears, there's a house full of confusion.

programme.title: Helicopter Eela
programme.desc: An aspiring singer and single mother, Eela, gives up her dream to concentrate on raising her son. When he goes to college years later, Eela can't bear to be without him, so she takes a place at the same college, but he finds her attention smothering.

programme.title: Singham
programme.desc: A brave and honest policeman patiently settles every dispute in his town with his words of wisdom and resorts only to using force when necessary.

programme.title: Mohenjo Daro
programme.desc: In 2016 B.C., a farmer in the Indus Valley travels to a city and saves the life of a beautiful woman.
programme.category: Film, Actie, Avontuur, Historisch drama, Romantiek

programme.title: Raja Babu
programme.desc: A man tries to become a better son after his intended bride rejects him and he learns he was adopted from a poor family.

programme.title: Suryavanshi
programme.desc: An archaeologist unearths an underground palace at Sangramgarh. The locals are afraid of what will happen if they start digging and would like to leave the past alone. It turns out their fears we confounded.

programme.title: Ribbon
programme.desc: Following a married couple and the challenges they face when they have to deal with unplanned parenthood.

programme.title: Sholay
programme.desc: The tale of one man's fight for justice. In an act of retribution, cold-blooded criminal Gabbar Singh massacres the family of a police officer, Thakur Baldev. Left crippled by his enemy, Thakur is hungry for revenge but, seeing no way of bringing Gabbar to book, he hires two petty crooks, Veeru and Jai.

programme.title: Dil Toh Baccha Hai Ji
programme.desc: Watch the hilarious journey of three men staying under the same roof in search of love. Eventually they all meet the loves of their lives, but will they be able to convince their ladies that it is true love?

programme.title: Daddy Cool
programme.desc: A lazy police officer and his son cross paths with a cricket player linked to betting and match fixing; things get serious when the son is kidnapped.

programme.title: Maatr
programme.desc: Vidya, who's left shattered after her daughter Tia's murder, seeks vengeance by fighting the broken justice and criminal system.

programme.title: Jatt & Juliet 2
programme.desc: In order to get promoted, Fateh Singh, a constable, agrees to journey to Canada in order to find the commissioner's daughter. However, he lands up falling in love with her.

programme.title: Pyaar Karke Dekho
programme.desc: Ravi Kumar moves to Mumbai to pursue his lifelong dream of becoming a singer and dancer. He lies to his landlady that he is married but is baffled when Urvashi claims to be his wife.

programme.title: Sunshine Music Tours and Travels
programme.desc: Two young boys who share the love of music set out on a road trip from Kashmir to Goa with some strangers.

programme.title: Barefoot to Goa
programme.desc: Diya and her elder brother, Prakhar, embark on a journey to a Southern India beach paradise to pick up their estranged grandmother, who their parents have disowned, after reading letters she regularly sends.

programme.title: Rang Panjab
programme.desc: A man who stands against the bad things he is seeing happening around him such as politics, administration problems, drugs, crime.

programme.title: Jolly LLB 2
programme.desc: A lawyer tricks a widow into giving him money so that he can start his own law firm. However, he is filled with guilt and remorse when he learns that she has committed suicide and that her husband was a victim of injustice.

programme.title: Chhapaak
programme.desc: A young woman tries to rebuild her life after a man throws acid in her face on a public street in New Delhi in 2005.

programme.title: Aiyaary
programme.desc: After an army mentor and his protege have a fallout, the protege goes rogue and threatens to bring down the government. The mentor is forced to go after him.

programme.title: Angrezi Medium
programme.desc: An unassuming mithai shop owner and single father is set to fulfil his daughter's dream to study in London. However, certain misadventures lead him and his family on a new quest, which renews their relationships and bonds.

programme.title: O Teri
programme.desc: Prantabh and Anand, associated with a news channel in Delhi, are in search of a big scam to prove a point to their senior. A dead body accidentally lands up in their car.

programme.title: Sarkar Raj
programme.desc: When Anita Raja, CEO of Sheppard power plant, brings a power plant proposal to set up in rural Mahrashtra before the Nagres, insightful Shankar is quick to realise the benefits the power plant can bring to the people.

programme.title: Door Ki Awaaz
programme.desc: Prakash lives in Chandan Nagar along with his sister Mala his and widowed mom. During a train ride, Mala has an accident and is brought to hospital.

programme.title: Break Ke Baad
programme.desc: Two childhood friends fall in love as adults. Their relationship is ruined when they realise they want different things from life, but fate has other things in store for them.

programme.title: 2 States
programme.desc: A man and a woman come from two very different cultural backgrounds, and decide that they won't get married until they convince their parents. As feared, differences between the families pose a hurdle.

programme.title: Sanam Re
programme.desc: Aakash and Shruti are unaware of the fact that if there is love, there will surely be conflict.

programme.title: Jatt James Bond
programme.desc: Shinda was mistreated by his relatives therefore he finds other ways to have his love Laali. Shinda and his two other friends come up with a plan to solve all of their problems.

programme.title: Kaabil
programme.desc: Rohan was a kind, happy, young man until he was struck by a terrible tragedy. Now driven by the fire of vengeance, nothing will stop him, not even the fact that he has been blind since birth.

programme.title: Khiladiyon Ka Khiladi
programme.desc: A man embarks on a dangerous search for his missing brother, who is wanted by the American police.

programme.title: Ishq
programme.desc: Four friends go against their parents' wishes and marry for love instead of money.

programme.title: Do Knot Disturb
programme.desc: A case of mistaken identities unfolds when a businessmantries to cover up his extramarital affair with a model by hiring a waiter to pose as the model's boyfriend.

programme.title: Ishq
programme.desc: Four friends go against their parents' wishes and marry for love instead of money.

programme.title: Ardaas Karaan
programme.desc: Three elderly men have to deal with the changing times, as well as the conflicts amongst their family members. At the same time, they attempt to establish important family values.

programme.title: Baadshaho
programme.desc: An Indian queen asks her bodyguard to steal back gold taken from her by the Indian government during the emergency period in 1975.
programme.category: Film, Actie, Thriller, Historisch drama, Avontuur

programme.title: Bhaag Milkha Bhaag
programme.desc: This is a true story of `the Flying Sikh' - world champion runner and Olympian Milkha Singh who overcame the massacre of his family and the civil war during the India-Pakistan partition.

programme.title: Mirzya
programme.desc: In a modern adaptation of an ancient folk tale, lovers from different social classes are kept apart by their families.

programme.title: Kurukshetra
programme.desc: Political furore follows a police officer's pursuit of two well-connected rapists.

programme.title: Dhol
programme.desc: Four broke and accident-prone men decide to court a rich girl hoping that one of them will marry her and all will live their life in comfort.

programme.title: Dulaara
programme.desc: When Raja and Priya fall in love, Priya's brother frames Raja for murder. The only way for Raja to clear his name is to find the real killer.

programme.title: Golmaal Again
programme.desc: The gang encounters with some spiritual bodies and finds out the truth about the Jamnadas Orphanage where they were brought up.

programme.title: Waah! Tera Kya Kehna
programme.desc: After a man loses his mind in an accident, his two elder brothers begin a conspiracy that includes the death of their father.

programme.title: Pyaar Ke Side Effects
programme.desc: A couple have totally different views on relationships. Trisha wants Sid to commit and Sid doesn't believe in commitment.

programme.title: Manje Bistre
programme.desc: A man falls in love while helping to plan his sister's wedding.

programme.title: Hate Story 3
programme.desc: Aditya, a successful businessman, stepped on toes and made enemies on his way to the top. Now, one of those enemies has returned for revenge.

programme.title: Made in China
programme.desc: A failed businessman goes to China with a special business plan.

programme.title: The President Is Coming
programme.desc: Six contestants compete to shake President Bush's hand and resort to extreme measures to win.

programme.title: Dil Dosti Etc
programme.desc: Delhi-based students Sanjay Mishra, and Apurv, challenge each other to win the University elections and sleep with three different girls respectively before the election results are revealed.

programme.title: Ek Deewana Tha
programme.desc: An aspiring film-maker from Mumbai falls in love with a woman from a strict orthodox Christian family.

programme.title: Do Matwale
programme.desc: Forced to resort to crime to arrange money for his mother's treatment, Amar ends up falling in love with Dr Pooja. However, a major obstacle in their path is her brother Ajay, who holds a grudge against Amar for getting him arrested in the past.

programme.title: Bhoot Unkle
programme.desc: For twelve-year old orphan Shyam, life had been nothing but a series of tragedies and hardships, until he unexpectedly stumbled upon a haunted place which was abandoned by the inhabitants of the town he lived in.

programme.title: Mangal Pandey - The Rising
programme.desc: Based on the life and times of Mangal Pandey. A film about the leader of the 1857 mutiny and his fight against the British rule.

programme.title: Running Shaadi
programme.desc: Two friends set up a website where couples can elope and get married against the wishes of their families. Their project is an instant hit and they help different people get married.

programme.title: Sardaar Ji
programme.desc: Jaggi Singh, the professional ghostbuster from rural Punjab is invited to driving away a ghost in London. Hilarious situations ensue when he falls in love with the ghost.

programme.title: India's Most Wanted
programme.desc: Five unlikely heroes embark on a dangerous covert operation to capture one of India's deadliest terrorists.

programme.title: Maatr
programme.desc: Vidya, who's left shattered after her daughter Tia's murder, seeks vengeance by fighting the broken justice and criminal system.

programme.title: Tezz
programme.desc: To avenge his past, Aakash Rana plants a bomb in a train, endangering the lives of 500 passengers.

programme.title: Do Qaidi
programme.desc: Do Qaidi is a 1989 Bollywood film directed by Ajay Kashyap starring Govinda, Sanjay Dutt, Farah and Neelam Kothari.

programme.title: Dil Jo Bhi Kahey
programme.desc: While studying in Sweden, Indian Jai Sinha falls in love with Sophie Besson, a European, and they decide to marry. Back in Mauritius, both families have problems with their offspring's choice of partner. One parent approves, while the other does not. Jai is pressured to marry an Indian girl, who discovers where her fiancé's heart lies and withdraws. Can Jai and Sophie be together now?

programme.title: Do Dooni Panj
programme.desc: A college graduate sues his school and his teachers when he cannot get a job.

programme.title: Panga
programme.desc: Panga is inspired from the life of a national level Kabbadi player from India. It follows her triumphs, struggle and overcoming of stereotypes and reflecting upon the importance of love and family support in order to become successful.

programme.title: Jhootha Hi Sahi
programme.desc: Siddhart's number is mistakenly printed on fliers of an Indian suicide helpline; his life takes an unusual turn and he falls in love with a caller.

programme.title: Ramprasad Ki Tehrvi
programme.desc: Conflicts, complications and confrontations make for an emotional and eventful affair when a multigenerational family reunites in Lucknow.

programme.title: Sardaarji 2
programme.desc: A simple farmer's life becomes complicated after he tries to save his village. He travels to Australia to earn money in order to help the economy crisis in his village back home.

programme.title: Bioscopewala
programme.desc: While investigating her father's death in a plane crash during his travel to Afghanistan, Minnie comes across Rehmat Khan, a man who used to entertain her with his bioscope show when she was a child.

programme.title: Maqbool
programme.desc: Maqbool is the loyal man of Jahangir Khan, a powerful underworld don. But Maqbool is in love with Nimmi, Jahangir's mistress, who convinces him to be ambitious and take over the empire.

programme.title: Mandi
programme.desc: Sanctimonious politicians of Hyderabad attempt to close down a popular brothel that is located on a prime piece of real estate.

programme.title: Dillagi
programme.desc: Ranvir and Rajvir along with their parents move to Mumbai. They endure numerous hardships, but their will to survive prevails and they succeed.

programme.title: Deewanapan
programme.desc: Bringing the best in entertainment.

programme.title: Dhruva
programme.desc: A committed police officer is on a very dangerous mission to destroy the most corrupt person in the country, Siddharth Abhimanyu.

programme.title: Aisha
programme.desc: Aisha is a girl with a simple diktat: everyone's business is her business. Arjun, a boy with even a simpler set of beliefs thinks Aisha should mind her own business.

programme.title: The Ghazi Attack
programme.desc: In 1971, an Indian naval submarine, S21, intercepts a Pakistani submarine, PNS Ghazi, in Indian water during a routine surveillance and thwarts its mission of destroying INS Vikrant.

programme.title: Mar Gaye Oye Loko
programme.desc: A man's soul is accidentally taken to heaven by Yama instead of the other one who he really came to take away with him. He must find a way to make it back down to earth in order to marry the woman he loves.

programme.title: Nishabd
programme.desc: Vijay enjoys the good life: happily married, wealthy and a beautiful daughter. However, one summer, when his daughter brings a friend back to stay, their familial bliss is shattered.

programme.title: Makkhi
programme.desc: At its heart, Makkhi is a love story. Jani remains a friendly stalker to Bindu in his lifetime and is reunited with her as a fly, again a constant companion, a watchful protector.

programme.title: Tennis Buddies
programme.desc: A young tennis player gets trained by her father who used to play the game too. Problems arise when they do not agree with each other's ideologies of playing single as against playing as a team.

programme.title: Dear Dad
programme.desc: A teenager and his father form a special bond with each other while on an unplanned road trip from their home in Delhi to the former's boarding school in Mussoorie.

programme.title: Dil Hai Ki Manta Nahin
programme.desc: A rich man's daughter runs away from her father's yacht to go to her betrothed, a movie star.

programme.title: Deewana Main Deewana
programme.desc: A man's instant attraction to a woman becomes an obsession as he adopts a friend's identity and commits murder in order to get closer to her.

programme.title: Hero
programme.desc: After meeting the chief of police's pretty daughter, a gangster kidnaps the girl. During the journey they fall in love and the gangster decides to set her free.

programme.title: Bala
programme.desc: A prematurely balding man attempts to cope with his situation.

programme.title: Angrezi Medium
programme.desc: An unassuming mithai shop owner and single father is set to fulfil his daughter's dream to study in London. However, certain misadventures lead him and his family on a new quest, which renews their relationships and bonds.

programme.title: Yamla Pagla Deewana Phir Se
programme.desc: An upright Ayurveda practitioner is hounded by big pharmacy giants for his age-old formula that cures everything.

programme.title: Dishoom
programme.desc: Two cops go on a mission to rescue a man, a leading cricketer, who has been kidnapped by a bookie and his associate.

programme.title: 31st October
programme.desc: On 31st October 1984, Prime Minister of India gets assassinated by her Sikh Security Guards. Politicians use this incident to spark public hatred towards the Sikhs labelling them as traitors.

programme.title: Dolly Ki Doli
programme.desc: A con woman pursues and traps young men in marriage, and on their wedding night, she takes off with all the money and jewellery.

programme.title: Ghar
programme.desc: Newly married Vikas and Aarti take a trip to the cinema for a late-night movie. When they leave, they decide to walk and end up being assaulted by a gang of men who leave Vikas unconscious and gang-rape Aarti. The incident is heavily publicised and it leaves Vikas and Aarti traumatised and in a loveless relationship. Can anything save their marriage?

programme.title: Jeena Sirf Mere Liye
programme.desc: Pooja and Karan are childhood sweethearts. They separate shortly after but they do not forget their vows. Later Pooja meets Karan, only to find out that he has a girlfriend by the name of Seema.

programme.title: Hameshaa
programme.desc: Yash falls in love with his childhood friend, Raja. When Raja falls in love with Rani, Yash kills him. When Raja hears about this, she jumps to her own death leaving Yash heartbroken.

programme.title: Rehna Hai Tere Dil Mein
programme.desc: Cupid strikes Maddy when he meets the beautiful Reena. To win her, he assumes the identity of Rajiv, whom she is supposed to marry.

programme.title: M.S. Dhoni: The Untold Story
programme.desc: Coaches, mentors and friends inspire young MS Dhoni to become a master cricketer and captain of Team India.

programme.title: Super 30
programme.desc: Brilliant mathematician Anand Kumar helps 30 smart but underprivileged students prepare for entrance exams for the Indian Institutes of Technology.

programme.title: Fukrey
programme.desc: The paths of four dream-chasing college friends cross with an array of colourful characters, from a tough-talking Punjabi female don to a street smart college watchman. Mayhem ensues.

programme.title: Mangal Pandey - The Rising
programme.desc: Based on the life and times of Mangal Pandey. A film about the leader of the 1857 mutiny and his fight against the British rule.

programme.title: Ferrari Ki Sawaari
programme.desc: How the pursuit of an Indian cricket legend's Ferrari makes a young boy's dreams of playing cricket at Lords a reality.

programme.title: I, Me Aur Main
programme.desc: As Ishaan, a music producer who has commitment issues with the women in his life, feels a connection with Gauri, his next-door neighbour, he begins to learn the importance of relationships.

programme.title: Jhootha Hi Sahi
programme.desc: Siddhart's number is mistakenly printed on fliers of an Indian suicide helpline; his life takes an unusual turn and he falls in love with a caller.

programme.title: Dear Dad
programme.desc: A teenager and his father form a special bond with each other while on an unplanned road trip from their home in Delhi to the former's boarding school in Mussoorie.

programme.title: Jatt & Juliet
programme.desc: Fateh Singh, who wants to marry a Canadian, meets Pooja, who wants to study in Canada. Though they don't get along initially, they soon find themselves drawn to each other.

programme.title: Panga
programme.desc: Panga is inspired from the life of a national level Kabbadi player from India. It follows her triumphs, struggle and overcoming of stereotypes and reflecting upon the importance of love and family support in order to become successful.

programme.title: Arjun Reddy
programme.desc: A brilliant medical student starts down a self-destructive path after his girlfriend is forced to marry another man.

programme.title: Makkhi
programme.desc: At its heart, Makkhi is a love story. Jani remains a friendly stalker to Bindu in his lifetime and is reunited with her as a fly, again a constant companion, a watchful protector.

programme.title: Laal Rang
programme.desc: Desperate for money, Rajesh joins his friend's blood-theft operation. As Rajesh's greed grows and the cops close in, his friend is poised to explode.

programme.title: Dishoom
programme.desc: Two cops go on a mission to rescue a man, a leading cricketer, who has been kidnapped by a bookie and his associate.

programme.title: Hungama
programme.desc: A story about a group of misfits who end up in hilarious situations and an investigation of an insane man.

programme.title: M.S. Dhoni: The Untold Story
programme.desc: Coaches, mentors and friends inspire young MS Dhoni to become a master cricketer and captain of Team India.

programme.title: Tum Bin
programme.desc: Shekhar visits Canada to help Pia, whose fiance is mistakenly killed by Shekhar. Abhay, another businessman, falls in love with Pia.

programme.title: Guest iin London
programme.desc: A young couple in London struggle to live with their estranged aunt and uncle who turn up at their house uninvited.

programme.title: Hum
programme.desc: A wealthy and cruel businessman and lord over a dockyard is making slaves out of all his workers. Three brothers with a troubled past decides to fight against his injustice.

programme.title: War
programme.desc: An Indian soldier is assigned to eliminate his former mentor and he must keep his wits about him if he is to be successful in his mission. When the two men collide, it results in a barrage of battles and bullets.

programme.title: Miss 420
programme.desc: After an agent is assassinated, an investigative reporter discovers some evidence that points to gangster Diwan Kapoor. However, the reporter is kidnapped. Watch the drama unfolds?

programme.title: Gali Gali Chor Hai
programme.desc: Bharat, a typical Indian common man, lives in Bhopal in central India and decides one day to fight against the ongoing corruption in his country.

programme.title: Hawaa Hawaai
programme.desc: A young boy from a poor family who dreams of becoming a skating champion. It is his heroic journey of hard-work and dedication that helps him realize the dream of his life!

programme.title: Sholay
programme.desc: The tale of one man's fight for justice. In an act of retribution, cold-blooded criminal Gabbar Singh massacres the family of a police officer, Thakur Baldev. Left crippled by his enemy, Thakur is hungry for revenge but, seeing no way of bringing Gabbar to book, he hires two petty crooks, Veeru and Jai.

programme.title: Pyar To Hona Hi Tha
programme.desc: A jilted woman flying to India to win her ex back gets in trouble as a co-traveller smuggles a diamond necklace in her bag. While steering clear of problems and helping each other get what they want, the duo comes to realise the true meaning of love.

programme.title: Garam Masala
programme.desc: A skirt-chasing photographer constructs an elaborate pretence to three-time three unsuspecting airhostesses. But when his kindred spirit tries to get in on it, everything is thrown into a wild disarray.

programme.title: Kabali
programme.desc: A man attempts to protect his family from enemies, gained in his time as a gangster. After he is released from prison on false charges, he resumes his post as gang leader and continues a long-held rivalry.

programme.title: Love Sex Aur Dhokha
programme.desc: A video camcorder, a store security camera, and concealed cameras candidly expose lives in three loosely linked tales.

programme.title: Miss Tanakpur Haazir Ho
programme.desc: Miss Tanakpur is a political satire that unfolds in the backdrop of a love-story set in a village of Haryana.

programme.title: Bal Ganesh And The Pomozom Planet
programme.desc: The story behind Lord Ganesh's voracious appetite which recalls the incident of Lord Kubera inviting Lord Shiva and Goddess Parvathi for a feast and the consequential events.
